ogTitle: Croydon South vs Cudgee: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Croydon South and Cudgee.
heading: Croydon South vs Cudgee — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Croydon South, Victoria and Cudgee, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cudgee has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Croydon South (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Croydon South or Cudgee safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Croydon South has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Cudgee scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Croydon South scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Cudgee scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Croydon South or Cudgee?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cudgee has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
